column1: # Access Control List (ACL) for this module.
# Rule 1: Grant Sales Users access to fleet.vehicle
#   Needed so the SO confirmation code can find/create fleet vehicles.
# Rule 2: Grant Sales Users access to fleet.vehicle.log.services
#   Needed so the SO confirmation code can create fleet service records.
# perm_unlink=0 on both -> salespeople CANNOT delete vehicles or services.
